channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Agentic AI Hackathon with OpenClaw (Prizes and pizza!)
item.description: Join us on Saturday, June 6th, for a beginner-friendly hackathon exploring AI agents on OpenClaw - an open-source platform for building, running, and orchestrating AI agents that can reason through problems, use tools, and complete multi-step tasks, all using natural language. This event is hosted by Tetherless World Constellation in collaboration with GRAIL (https://grailai.io). Pizza and prizes included. Registration is required.
item.author: Students

item.title: CCPD Virtual Appointments Notice
item.description: Due to ongoing campus construction, the Center for Career and Professional Development (CCPD) will be offering virtual appointments only at this time. If you require any special accommodations or need to meet on campus, please get in touch with us at ccpd@rpi.edu, and we will work with you to arrange an in-person option. To schedule a virtual appointment with one of our career counselors, please log in to Handshake. We appreciate your understanding and apologize for any inconvenience.
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer 2026 Dining & Retail Hours Starting May 18th, 2026
item.description: Summer 2026 is coming up fast click the link above for everything you need to know about the dining and retail hours on campus during the summer semester.
item.author: Community

item.title: Panera Hours of Operation Change Starting 5/26/2026
item.description: Please note that Panera will have a change in hours of operations beginning 5/26/2026. To better serve our community this summer, Panera will now be open from 10:00 am - 6:00 pm Monday - Friday. Thank you for your understanding and continued support of Rensselaer Dining. Be sure to follow Rensselaer Dining on social media @rensselaerdining for all the latest updates.
item.author: Community

item.title: Memorial Day Weekend Dining Hours
item.description: Dining and Retail Hours of Operations will vary for the upcoming Memorial Day Weekend Holiday. Please click the link above for all the details. Thank you and enjoy your Memorial Day Weekend!
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI LGTBQ+ Taskforce & EMPAC Pride Celebration!
item.description: Get ready to celebrate love, identity, and community—we’re thrilled to invite you to our Pride Preparation Party on Friday, May 29th and to march with us in the Capital Pride Parade on Sunday, June 14th! Please fill out this form and share if you plan to join!
item.author: Community

item.title: RARE Student Wins First Place at International Science and Engineering Fair
item.description: The Rensselaer Astrobiology Research and Education (RARE) Center is proud to congratulate local high school student Makaila on winning First Place in the Earth and Environmental Sciences category at the Regeneron International Science and Engineering Fair (ISEF) in Phoenix, Arizona. Her project, “Investigating the Stability of Prebiotic Uracil Under the Conditions of Impact-Generated Terrestrial Hydrothermal Systems,” earned a $6,000 award and reflects two summers of research conducted in the…
item.author: Community

item.title: RARE Student Selected for NASA SEES Internship
item.description:
The Rensselaer Astrobiology Research and Education (RARE) Center is pleased to share that high school student Stella has been selected for the highly competitive NASA STEM Enhancement in Earth Science (SEES) internship program. Stella was selected for the in-person planetary geology internship and will spend two weeks this summer at The University of Texas at Austin before continuing the remainder of the program online. Congratulations to Stella on this exciting achievement and opportunity in…

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
